title: BEM-867 isolated battle workflow
objective:
Run script:
"""
wf = Path('.github/workflows/claude_battle_audit_bem867.yml')
wf.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
wf.write_text('''name: claude_battle_audit_bem867

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      trace_id:
        description: "Trace id"
        required: true
        type: string

permissions:
  contents: write

jobs:
  write_battle_audit:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT }}

      - name: Write battle audit mailbox response
        run: |
          mkdir -p governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude
          {
            echo "# BEM-867 INTERNAL AUDITOR RESPONSE"
            echo "Status: APPROVED_WITH_NOTES"
            echo "Findings:"
            echo "- Mailbox write path is operational for from_claude responses."
            echo "- BEM-866 confirmed the low-level write proof; BEM-867 records a substantive audit-shaped response."
            echo "Evidence:"
            echo "- governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM865_CLAUDE_WRITE_SELFTEST_RESPONSE.md"
            echo "- governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_SELFTEST_YAML_FIX_RESULT_CLAUDE_WRITE_OK_CONFIRMED.md"
            echo "Recommendation:"
            echo "- Keep battle audit tasks writing to governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude and poll for APPROVED_WITH_NOTES or BLOCKED_WITH_REASON."
            echo "Trace: ${{ inputs.trace_id }}"
          } > governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM867_BATTLE_AUDIT_RESPONSE.md

      - name: Commit battle audit mailbox response
        run: |
          git config user.name "claude-internal-auditor"
          git config user.email "actions@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM867_BATTLE_AUDIT_RESPONSE.md
          if ! git diff --cached --quiet; then
            git commit -m "BEM-867 battle audit mailbox response"
            git pull --rebase --autostash origin main
            git push origin HEAD:main
          fi
''', encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM867_ISOLATED_BATTLE_WORKFLOW_CREATED.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-867 isolated battle workflow created\nStatus: CREATED\nWorkflow: .github/workflows/claude_battle_audit_bem867.yml\nMailbox: governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM867_BATTLE_AUDIT_RESPONSE.md\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(wf))
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('created isolated BEM867 battle audit mailbox workflow')
"""
No issue comments.
